overall.description: Cinematic footage from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) depicting a Gothic-style circular classroom with blue walls, gold accents, and tall arched stained glass windows. Students in dark robes are seated around a large curved wooden table, with additional students periodically entering from the left and taking seats while the camera remains stationary.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic circular classroom with curved study table

agents.ego_description: standing still near the wall observing the classroom and seated students

entered.detail: Large curved wooden table with books and papers scattered on the surface
Tall arched stained glass windows with intricate designs allowing natural light to enter
Ornate blue Gothic wall paneling with gold decorative trim and pointed arches
Elaborate golden chandelier hanging from the domed ceiling with multiple lights
Tall wooden bookshelf filled with books against the left wall
Large framed paintings hanging on the left wall depicting figures

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a static view of an ornate Gothic circular classroom with deep blue walls and tall arched windows. Several students in dark robes are seated around a large curved wooden table, focused on their studies. The room is illuminated by warm light from golden chandeliers and natural light filtering through the stained glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic circular classroom with curved study table

events.description: A student in dark robes enters the classroom from the left doorway

agents.ego_description: maintaining position while observing the student entering the room

notable_agents.action: student entering from the left doorway and walking toward the table to take a seat

segments.scene_description: A student enters from the left side of the room and walks toward the curved wooden table to join the others. The classroom maintains its serene atmosphere with students focused on their work at the table, while the Gothic architecture and chandeliers remain prominent in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic circular classroom with curved study table

events.description: Another student enters from the left doorway and approaches the table
A third student enters from the left side of the classroom

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the classroom as additional students arrive and take seats

notable_agents.action: student entering from left and walking to an empty chair at the table
another student entering later and approaching the table

segments.scene_description: Additional students enter the classroom from the left at various points during this segment, each walking to the curved table and taking a seat among the others. The room maintains its consistent Gothic atmosphere with blue walls, golden chandeliers, and stained glass windows as the students settle in to study.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective of a serene Gothic classroom that gradually fills with students as they gather for their studies. It begins with a view of an ornate circular room featuring deep blue walls, golden chandeliers, and tall arched stained glass windows where several students in dark robes are already seated at a large curved wooden table. As the scene unfolds, a single student enters from the left and walks toward the table to join the group. The space then becomes increasingly populated as additional students enter from the same side at various intervals, each taking a seat among their peers. The room concludes in a state of quiet academic focus, with the consistent glow of warm light and the prominence of the Gothic architecture framing the now-full table.
